mission.title: tikv: compaction-filter: consider  mvcc-delete as redundant key to trigger rocksdb compaction
mission.description:
### What is changed and how it works?

Issue Number: Close #17269 

What's Changed:

```commit-message
compaction-filter: consider mvcc.delete as redundant key to trigger Rocksdb compaction
```

### Release note

```release-note
compaction-filter: consider mvcc.delete as redundant key to trigger Rocksdb compaction
```
